title: ReviewerPerSpecOutput
description: Per-spec output of the reviewer_per_spec agent (P4). One LLM call per spec_id; results are aggregated and demoted/decided in deterministic Python synthesis. Each call returns axis_findings (one per axis), optional minor_findings, and an optional block_recommendation.

spec_id.description: spec_id this review covers; matches the spec_id passed in template_vars.

axis_findings.description: Exactly one entry per axis: code, test_plan, test_code, test_evidence. Synthesis aggregates these across specs into the batch-level reviewer_output.axis_findings.

minor_findings.description: Less-satisfactory-but-non-fatal observations the reviewer wants to surface for this spec. Synthesis merges these (plus axis-3/4 demotions) into the batch-level reviewer_output.minor_findings.

block_recommendation.description: Set when this spec/AC is internally contradictory (kind=ambiguity) or scope-conflicts with another spec (kind=scope_conflict). Synthesis honors per-spec block recommendations when deciding response_kind.

offending_criterion_ids.description: When status is fail or insufficient_evidence, the criterion_ids that prompted the finding. Empty when status is pass.

kind.description: ambiguity: spec/AC is internally contradictory or under-specified. scope_conflict: satisfying this spec's criteria would violate another spec's criteria.

conflicting_spec_ids.description: When kind=scope_conflict, the other spec_ids implicated. Synthesis matches scope_conflict pairs by mutual reference.
